scenario: Live current-session trigger, reload, X/Y/A/B, and stick input reaches desktop while packet stream is active.
expected: Desktop receiver updates trigger, reload, X/Y/A/B, and stick while released controls clear.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; no real-device observation recorded yet.

scenario: Short control presses reach desktop as low-latency edge changes.
expected: Desktop receiver shows short trigger, reload, X/Y/A/B down/up edges without waiting for a later snapshot.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; no real-device observation recorded yet.

scenario: Raw Android motion/provider updates reach desktop while stream is active.
expected: Desktop receiver raw motion/provider fields update while packet stream remains active.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; no real-device observation recorded yet.

scenario: Short reliable-control or LAN interruption enters grace state.
expected: Unchanged-session UDP may continue during the configured grace window and packet stream shows grace.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; no real-device observation recorded yet.

scenario: Grace expiry clears active controls and marks stream stale.
expected: Active buttons, pressed controls, and stick axes clear; last raw motion remains visible with stale status.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; no real-device observation recorded yet.

scenario: Trusted reconnect rejects old UDP input before apply.
expected: Fresh stream config makes new stream active; old prior-stream UDP frame is rejected before apply when replay or resend evidence is available.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; mark blocked if replay/resend tooling is unavailable.

scenario: Valid desktop haptic command starts one Android phone pulse.
expected: Phone pulses once and Android returns started.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; no real-device observation recorded yet.

scenario: Expired desktop haptic command is rejected without phone pulse.
expected: Phone does not pulse and Android returns expired.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; no real-device observation recorded yet.

scenario: Trusted session change cancels active phone haptic and rejects old stream input.
expected: Active phone pulse is cancelled, Android returns cancelled, and old stream input is rejected.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; no real-device observation recorded yet.

scenario: Short reliable-control disconnect without session change does not cancel active phone pulse.
expected: No cancel result is emitted solely because of the short disconnect.
sanitized_notes: Planned physical smoke row; no real-device observation recorded yet.
